Title: Secure AI in schools with Microsoft Security
Description: Guide education customers in securing AI data with Microsoft Security tools, focusing on data loss prevention, sensitivity labels, and Security Copilot.

Title: Explore social emotional learning: Mindfulness in Minecraft Education
Description: Minecraft Education Mindful Knight World introduces the basics of mindfulness to help students understand the benefits and main concepts.

Title: Innovate learning with the 21CLD real-world problem solving and innovation dimension
Description: Explore real-world problem solving for educators and the dimensions that must be present in such classroom activities to prepare learners with 21st century skills.

Title: Deploy Microsoft 365 for Education with the Microsoft Education Solution Guide (Partner Success Series)
Description: Explore the guide’s phases, sections, and delivery sequence, and then map them to your tenant’s licensing to build a practical deployment plan for Microsoft 365 for Education. Part of the Partner Success Series.

Title: Support reading fluency practice with Reading Progress
Description: Reading Progress in Microsoft Teams helps learners build reading fluency while allowing educators to easily track progress and save time for active instruction.

Title: Create authentic assessments with Microsoft Forms
Description: Educators use Microsoft Forms for surveys, quizzes, and polls in the classroom to increase student engagement and save time.

Title: Develop critical thinking skills with the 21CLD knowledge construction dimension
Description: Introduce educators to the dimension of knowledge construction which helps learners build deep knowledge that they can transfer and apply in practice.

Title: Foundations of a modern public sector security operations center
Description: Learn the importance of modernizing security operations centers (SOC) in public sector organizations and the steps involved in SOC modernization.

Title: Get started with OneNote for education
Description: Educators use OneNote to organize information and content and to support research, collaboration, note taking, journaling, and reflection.

Title: Equip and support learners with AI tools from Microsoft
Description: Help learners discover, interact, and create with AI and generative AI tools like Copilot including responsible use of AI and prompt engineering.

Title: Develop systems with organizational leadership
Description: School leaders use Microsoft 365 Education tools to promote a safe, efficient, and effective learning environment.

Title: Engage learners through games with MakeCode Arcade
Description: Learn the benefits of game-based learning and how games are used in Microsoft MakeCode Arcade to provide meaningful instruction to develop computer science concepts and skills.

Title: Develop understanding with the Study and Learn Agent in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app
Description: The Study and Learn Agent guides learners through inquiry-based understanding, practice, and study to build deeper, independent understanding and thinking skills.

Title: Increase educator adoption of Reflect
Description: Teach education customers to provide opportunities for students to reflect on learning so teachers can modify teaching according to students’ needs.

Title: Get ready for AI in education with Microsoft
Description: Equip your institution for AI with secure data management, AI readiness, and empowering educators for personalized learning.

Title: Explore mission-driven AI examples for nonprofits
Description: Explore AI examples in nonprofits and discover how organizations use AI to support mission-driven work. Learn best practices today.

Title: Work with your IT team and the Minecraft Student Ambassador program
Description: Work with your IT team to secure devices, manage technical support, and ensure device sanitation for your Minecraft Student Ambassadors. Part of a learning path.

Title: Support building mathematics skills with Math Progress
Description: Math Progress in Microsoft Teams helps learners build math skills while helping educators track progress and save time for active instruction.

Title: Set up the Teams Assignments LTI® app in learning management systems
Description: Learn how to set up the Teams Assignment LTI app within the learning management systems Canvas and Schoology Learning.

Title: Introduce coding in Minecraft Education
Description: Explore how educators may use block-based coding in Minecraft Education to introduce programming to their learners.

Title: School Data Sync for IT Admins (Partner Success Series)
Description: IT Admins learn how to implement School Data Sync for education customers. Part of the Partner Success Series.

Title: Transform education with strategic leadership
Description: Increase leadership capacity to support growth and opportunity with a shared and distributive leadership approach for the system and the school level.

Title: Increase educator adoption of Education Insights
Description: This module teaches education partners how to help customers proactively track student experiences with digestible visualizations.

Title: Begin Python coding in Minecraft with MakeCode
Description: Educators use the basics of Python, a text-based programming language, in Minecraft Education to build out coding knowledge to facilitate Python coding in the classroom

Title: Empower every student with an inclusive classroom
Description: Empower students to utilize tools to unlock their full potential by addressing a diversity of needs.

Title: Meet your ambassadors in the Minecraft Student Ambassador program
Description: With thoughtful planning and engaging activities Minecraft Student Ambassadors stay connected and grow as leaders.

Title: Enhance school communication and collaboration in Microsoft Teams
Description: Unlock the power of Microsoft Teams for administrators, educators, and learners. Learn to collaborate, customize, and organize effectively in Microsoft Teams.

Title: Transition to and prepare for fundamentals-level security, compliance, and identity course
Description: Understand the basics of cybersecurity to prepare for the fundamentals-level security, compliance, and identity course and prevent malicious attacks.

Title: Introduction to Learning Accelerators
Description: An overview of Learning Accelerators for education partners.

Title: Design and deliver interactive lessons with Microsoft Learning Zone
Description: Learn to use Microsoft Learning Zone to create and manage interactive lessons and improve student engagement using embedded activities and immediate feedback.

Title: Countdown to successful family-teacher conferences
Description: Educators gain an understanding of using Microsoft tools to plan and carry out a successful parent conference centered around the student.

Title: Recruit students to the Minecraft Student Ambassador program
Description: Recruit a diverse range of students to ensure the success of your Minecraft Student Ambassador program. Module 3 in a learning path.

Title: Build cybersecurity resilience in K-12 classrooms with Microsoft tools
Description: Use CISA's findings to boost school cybersecurity and classroom cyber culture. This module equips classroom educators with strategies for effective cybersecurity.

Title: Plan your year in the Minecraft Student Ambassador program
Description: Learn to plan for Minecraft Student Ambassador events, build leadership opportunities, and ensure smooth logistics for each aspect of your program.

Description: Our Dyslexia Teaching training allows you to deepen your understanding of dyslexia. Part 2 shows you next-level strategies and solutions for reading, spelling, and writing.

Description: Encourage quick thinking, adaptability, and problem-solving in your classroom with head-to-head challenges in Minecraft esports.

Description: Educators explore computational thinking in education, considering decomposition, pattern recognition, abstraction, and algorithmic thinking for cross-curricular teaching.

Description: Education systems integrators learn to enable free Copilot Chat and licensed Microsoft 365 Copilot, while ensuring security, compliance, and responsible AI use in schools.

Title: Embed 21st century skills with 21st century learning design

Description: Instructional leaders use Microsoft 365 to support learning environments with data analysis, differentiated learning, and educator feedback.

Description: Educators learn the features of Microsoft Education Insights and how to leverage the tools to identify trends and inform decision making to best support students.

Description: Public sector organizations use agentic AI, Copilot, and Azure AI Foundry to automate complex workflows, improve citizen service delivery, and govern AI responsibly.

Description: Learn to model responsible AI practice, protect learners and communities, and make thoughtful decisions about when and how to use AI.

Description: Teach in Microsoft 365 Copilot App centralizes AI-powered tools to help educators plan instruction, assess learning, and manage class artifacts in Microsoft 365.

Description: Learn how to install, configure, and deploy Microsoft Teams for Education in a school environment as a systems integrator. Part of the Partner Success Series.

Description: Learn about the College Board's AP Computer Science Principles course and explore the Microsoft MakeCode Arcade curriculum.

Description: Practice responding to real-world SOC scenarios using Security Copilot and Microsoft security tools that detect, investigate, and mitigate cybersecurity threats.

Title: Increase educator adoption of Reading Progress and Reading Coach
Description: Education partners can increase adoption of Reading Progress and Coach in education customers.

Title: Get started with Microsoft Teams for Education
Description: Microsoft Teams in educational settings is a hub for content and the centerpiece for collaboration. Learn about the structure and components of a team.

Description: Discover how Microsoft SharePoint enhances productivity, efficiency, and communication in education. Learn to create webpages, lists, and optimize libraries to power your classroom.

Title: OneNote Staff Notebook: Tools for staff collaboration
Description: Collaborate with OneNote Staff Notebooks, a personal workspace for staff and teachers, a content library for shared information, and a collaboration space.

Title: Introduce AI and data science in STEM education with FarmBeats for Students
Description: Educators teach AI and data science with FarmBeats for Students by solving real-world agricultural challenges in partnership with National FFA Organization.

Title: Facilitate a Minecraft Hour of AI experience
Description: Provide high-quality AI literacy and computer science instruction for students through a successful experience with Hour of AI in Minecraft Education.

Title: Increase educator adoption of search tools
Description: This module introduces Microsoft Search Coach and Search Progress for education partners.

Title: Minecraft Trainer Academy: Train educators to teach with Minecraft Education in the classroom
Description: The Minecraft Education Trainer Academy walks educators through best practices for preparing and facilitating a Minecraft Education training for their organization, provides the training materials, and inspires with ideas to create a training environment that empowers all to use Minecraft Education.\\

Title: Support social and emotional learning with Microsoft tools
Description: Learn practical ways to introduce social and emotional learning using Microsoft tools such as Minecraft to augment and enhance learning.

Title: Increase productivity with Office, OneNote, and Microsoft Edge browser in Windows 11
Description: Explore how educators transitioning to Microsoft 365 from other platforms increase productivity with Microsoft tools.

Title: Deploy and manage Agent 365 in education (Partner Success Series)
Description: Education system administrators can deploy, configure, and manage AI agents in Microsoft 365 using Agent 365, the control plane for agents. Part of the Partner Success Series.

Description: Create and organize content in Classwork, manage assignments, simplify assessments, give timely feedback, and track academic and SEL trends within Class Teams.

Description: Educators learn about the concept of self-regulation and to design learning activities to help learners develop it.

Title: Build challenges in Minecraft esports
Description: Esports in Minecraft Education using Build Challenges supports classroom goals.

Description: Educators learn about the curriculum framework of the AP Computer Science Principles course and how the Microsoft MakeCode curriculum meets the course's curricular goals.

Title: Empower educators to explore the potential of artificial intelligence
Description: Educators learn to use AI, generative AI, and Microsoft tools to personalize learning, automate tasks, and provide insights for education.

Description: This module explores how educators transitioning to Microsoft 365 from other platforms can use Teams and OneNote, two comprehensive programs that offer diverse options and a variety of features.

Title: Build social and emotional skills in your classroom community with Reflect
Description: Students need the words to express and address emotions. Educators must build a safe place for social and emotional wellbeing in the classroom.

Title: Use Power Automate to increase productivity
Description: Educators gain a greater understanding of what Power Automate is and explore what Power Automate can do. See how Power Automate can benefit educators simplify everyday tasks.

Description: K-12 IT professionals implement CISA-recommended cybersecurity practices to manage risks, maintain security protocols, and detect and respond to incidents.

Description: Use Minecraft lesson plans and worlds to blend Minecraft Education into your content for an impactful experience in the classroom.

Description: Introduce cybersecurity through Minecraft Education to learn about the benefits and setbacks of defense strategies, and the basics of cybersecurity.

Title: Discover Power Apps for Educators and reclaim your time 101
Description: Educators learn how to use Power Apps by creating apps for themselves that help save time and create administrative efficiencies.

Title: Collaborate with colleagues with staff and PLC teams in Microsoft Teams
Description: Staff teams and PLC teams in Microsoft Teams facilitate collaboration between professional colleagues and incorporate file sharing and organization.

Title: Introduction
Description: F# is an open-source, cross-platform programming language that makes it easy to write succinct, performant, robust, and practical code. It's a general-purpose language that enables you to create many different types of applications like Web API, Desktop, IoT, Gaming and more.

Title: Math Progress
Description: This Learning Path introduces Windows 11 Pro as a secure, high-performance platform designed to support AI-enabled work. Learners will explore how Windows can provide a flexible canvas for AI experiences, built-in security and management, resilient device fundamentals, and seamless integration with the Microsoft Cloud. The Learning Path covers how Windows 11 Pro supports intelligent workflows with AI and agents, simplifies IT management with security by default, and delivers reliable performance for mission-critical operations. By completing this Learning Path, learners will understand how they can use Windows 11 Pro to adopt AI while maintaining strong security, resiliency, and operational efficiency.

Title: Module assessment
Description: Implement Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management to detect, investigate, and respond to internal risks while protecting data, ensuring compliance, and maintaining employee trust.

Title: Explore continuous delivery with GitHub Actions
Description: Learn how to instrument distributed applications with OpenTelemetry and analyze telemetry data with Azure Monitor to observe and troubleshoot AI solutions on Azure.

Title: Module assessment
Description: Migrate application workloads and data to Azure

Title: Support organizational success
Description: Implement Windows Server high availability

Title: Design and implement Azure load balancer using the Azure portal
Description: Perform threat hunting in Microsoft Sentinel

Title: Introduction
Description: This learning path explains the concepts of supporting the desktop through its entire lifecycle. Students will also be introduced to Microsoft Entra ID and learn the similarities and differences between Microsoft Entra ID and Active Directory DS and how to synchronize between the two.

Title: Plan for Microsoft Entra integration
Description: Implement security through a pipeline using Azure DevOps. (AZ-2001)

Title: Implement extension methods for a class
Description: Create detections and perform investigations using Microsoft Sentinel

Title: Exercise - Create the CI workflow on GitHub
Description: Data is key to most business operations and services and an understanding of data is essential in many roles. This learning path covers data concepts, data analytics, and data roles, services, and products.

Title: Introduction
Description: This Learning Path introduces Surface for Business solutions and how they help organizations thrive. Learn about the latest Surface for Business devices, how to choose the right models for different roles, modernizing confidently after Windows 10 end of support, and planning and managing deployment. This path is deal for IT decision makers, IT administrators, and business leaders guiding device strategy and rollout.

Title: Exercise - Configure disposition review for contract retention
Description: In this learning path, students will learn about data protection and protecting endpoints against threats. This path will also cover the key capabilities of Microsoft Defender solutions.
